comment: Declarative agent with an OAuth- / Microsoft-Entra-protected API plugin built from scratch: pure render. The single require-empty-target step guards the create contract (the target dir has no colliding files) so render writes every file. The apiAuth selector dimension drives the MicrosoftEntra render var (the {{#MicrosoftEntra}} sections), distinguishing the microsoft-entra and oauth variants. No post-render injection — the API plugin action is pre-baked into repairDeclarativeAgent.json (the new-API-from-scratch path, not the spec-parser existing-API path).
